  -- This is a common result derived from the law of total expectation/probability.
  -- P(A) = E[P(A | X‚āĀ)]
  -- P(X‚āĀ < X‚āā) = ‚ąę P(X‚āĀ < X‚āā | X‚āĀ = x) f_{X‚āĀ}(x) dx
  -- By independence, P(X‚āĀ < X‚āā | X‚āĀ = x) = P(x < X‚āā) = P(X‚āā > x).

  -- Let's use the general formula `P(A) = ‚ąę_‚ĄĚ P(A|X=x) f_X(x) dx`.
  -- Here, `A = {X‚āĀ < X‚āā}`.
  -- `P(X‚āĀ < X‚āā)` given `X‚āĀ = x` is `P(x < X‚āā) = P(X‚āā > x)`.
  have h_meas_set : MeasurableSet {ŌČ : ő© | X‚āĀ ŌČ < X‚āā ŌČ} :=
    measurable_set_lt hX‚āĀ.measurable hX‚āā.measurable

  have integral_form : ‚Ąô {ŌČ | X‚āĀ ŌČ < X‚āā ŌČ} = ‚ąę x, (‚Ąô (X‚āā ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' (Set.Ioi x))).toReal * (hX‚āĀ.pdf ‚Ąô).toReal x ‚ąāvolume := by
    rw [ProbabilityTheory.probability_lt_of_indep h_indep hX‚āĀ.measurable hX‚āā.measurable]
    rfl

  -- Evaluate `‚Ąô(X‚āā > x)`.
  -- For `x < 0`, `‚Ąô(X‚āā > x) = 1` because `X‚āā ‚Č• 0` almost everywhere.
  -- For `x ‚Č• 0`, `‚Ąô(X‚āā > x) = exp (-őĽ‚āā * x)`.
  have P_X2_gt_x : ‚ąÄ x : ‚ĄĚ, (‚Ąô (X‚āā ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' (Set.Ioi x))).toReal = if x < 0 then 1 else exp (-őĽ‚āā * x) := by
    intro x
    split_ifs with hx
    ¬∑ -- case x < 0
      rw [hX‚āā.prob_mem_gt_of_le_zero (le_of_lt hx)]
      simp
    ¬∑ -- case x ‚Č• 0
      rw [hX‚āā.prob_mem_gt_of_nonneg (le_refl x)]
      simp [hőĽ‚āā] -- Add hőĽ‚āā here to satisfy the `exp_pos` condition for `prob_mem_gt_of_nonneg`

  -- Substitute this into the integral.
  rw [integral_form]
  -- The PDF of `X‚āĀ` is `őĽ‚āĀ * exp (-őĽ‚āĀ * x)` for `x ‚Č• 0`, and `0` otherwise.
  -- So the integral is only over `[0, ‚ąě)`.
  have integral_eq_on_Ici0 : ‚ąę x, (P_X2_gt_x x) * (hX‚āĀ.pdf ‚Ąô).toReal x ‚ąāvolume
      = ‚ąę x in Set.Ici 0, (exp (-őĽ‚āā * x)) * (hX‚āĀ.pdf ‚Ąô).toReal x ‚ąāvolume := by
    apply integral_congr_ae
    filter_upwards [hX‚āĀ.ae_eq_zero_of_neg_density hőĽ‚āĀ] with x hx_pdf_zero -- Pass hőĽ‚āĀ

    ¬∑ have := P_X2_gt_x x
      simp only [hx_neg, ite_true] at this
      field_simp [this.symm, (hX‚āĀ.pdf_eq_zero_of_neg hx_neg).toReal]
      rw [hx_pdf_zero]
    ¬∑ -- x >= 0
      have := P_X2_gt_x x
      simp only [hx_neg, ite_false] at this
      field_simp [this.symm]

  rw [integral_eq_on_Ici0]
  -- Substitute the actual PDF of X‚āĀ.
  have pdf_X1_on_Ici0 : ‚ąÄ x ‚Č• 0, (hX‚āĀ.pdf ‚Ąô).toReal x = őĽ‚āĀ * exp (-őĽ‚āĀ * x) := by
    intro x hx
    rw [hX‚āĀ.pdf_eq_rnDeriv_map_volume, Measure.exponential_rnDeriv_exp_volume_of_nonneg hx hőĽ‚āĀ]
    field_simp -- Use field_simp to simplify expression involving ENNReal.toReal
    norm_cast
    rw [mul_comm] -- ensure `őĽ‚āĀ` is first for `ofReal_mul` to work with types `‚ĄĚ` and `ENNReal` in the `simp`
    rfl

  have : ‚ąę x in Set.Ici 0, (exp (-őĽ‚āā * x)) * (hX‚āĀ.pdf ‚Ąô).toReal x ‚ąāvolume
      = ‚ąę x in Set.Ici 0, (exp (-őĽ‚āā * x)) * (őĽ‚āĀ * exp (-őĽ‚āĀ * x)) ‚ąāvolume := by
    apply integral_congr_on MeasurableSet.Ici
    intro x hx
    simp only [Set.mem_Ici] at hx
    rw [pdf_X1_on_Ici0 x hx]

  rw [this]
  -- Simplify the integrand: őĽ‚āĀ * exp (-őĽ‚āĀ * x) * exp (-őĽ‚āā * x) = őĽ‚āĀ * exp (-(őĽ‚āĀ + őĽ‚āā) * x).
  have simplify_integrand : ‚ąÄ x, (exp (-őĽ‚āā * x)) * (őĽ‚āĀ * exp (-őĽ‚āĀ * x)) = őĽ‚āĀ * exp (-(őĽ‚āĀ + őĽ‚āā) * x) := by
    intro x
    rw [mul_assoc, mul_comm (exp (-őĽ‚āā * x)), ‚Üźexp_add, mul_neg, mul_neg, ‚Üźneg_add, neg_mul_eq_neg_mul]
    ring_nf

  have : ‚ąę x in Set.Ici 0, (őĽ‚āĀ * exp (-(őĽ‚āĀ + őĽ‚āā) * x)) ‚ąāvolume
      = őĽ‚āĀ * ‚ąę x in Set.Ici 0, exp (-(őĽ‚āĀ + őĽ‚āā) * x) ‚ąāvolume := by
    rw [integral_mul_left]

  rw [this]
  -- Evaluate the integral `‚ąę‚āÄ^‚ąě exp (-(őĽ‚āĀ + őĽ‚āā) * x) dx`.
  -- This is the integral of the PDF for an exponential distribution with parameter `(őĽ‚āĀ + őĽ‚āā)`.
  -- The integral of a PDF over its domain is 1.
  -- Here, `‚ąę‚āÄ^‚ąě exp (-c * x) dx = 1/c` for `c > 0`.
  have integral_exp_term : ‚ąę x in Set.Ici 0, exp (-(őĽ‚āĀ + őĽ‚āā) * x) ‚ąāvolume = 1 / (őĽ‚āĀ + őĽ‚āā) := by

  -- Final result: őĽ‚āĀ * (1 / (őĽ‚āĀ + őĽ‚āā)) = őĽ‚āĀ / (őĽ‚āĀ + őĽ‚āā).
  field_simp [add_pos hőĽ‚āĀ hőĽ‚āā] -- Use `add_pos hőĽ‚āĀ hőĽ‚āā` for the denominator being non-zero.
